summary: Fashion products website with Pinterest integration
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Fashion-themed hero banner with elegant styling showing clothing on hangers or fashion accessories (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Placeholder product image for fashion items when no image URL is provided (placeholder-product.dim_400x600.png)

existing_features.title: Implement product browsing interface displaying fashion products in a grid layout with product images, names, prices, and categories
Add Pinterest integration allowing users to link products to Pinterest pins by storing Pinterest pin URLs or IDs with each product
Create product detail view showing full product information including name, description, price, category, large product image, and Pinterest pin link
Implement admin interface for authenticated users to add, edit, and delete fashion products with form validation
Add category filtering to allow users to browse products by fashion category (e.g., dresses, shoes, accessories)

Design a cohesive visual theme inspired by fashion e-commerce aesthetics with elegant typography, a sophisticated color palette (avoiding blue and purple), clean whitespace, and modern layout patterns that emphasize product imagery

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a product catalog backend with CRUD operations for fashion products including fields: name, description, price, category, image URL, and Pinterest pin ID
